creator: mjl@luckie.org.nz
text:
Created attachment 172816
update spoofer to 1.0.4

This version also applies to the port as it currently stands (1.0.2).  Changelog at:

https://www.caida.org/projects/spoofer/downloads/changelog.txt

Two patches in the current version of the port are no longer required, and the port installs icons.
